title: Distinct Grown Crops
description: A simple pack to identify fully grown crops with colored rings.
body:
# Distinct Grown Crops
A simple package to identify fully grown crops with colored rings. It only changes the final stages of beetroots, carrots, potatoes, wheat, melon and pumpkin stems, and nether warts. You can easily distinguish between watermelon and pumpkin.
![Different fully grown crops with colored rings above them.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0fc8dcfb6f2f04ce49d641a295fee24ced94ca0e.jpeg)
